norm_computation_semantics.official_source_expression: RMSNorm.forward: t, dtype = x.float(), x.dtype; t = t * rsqrt(mean(t**2) + eps); return (t * scale).to(dtype)

router_weight_metadata.layout_orientation: [num_experts, hidden_size]; Linear computes input @ weight.T + bias
router_weight_metadata.sha256_omitted_reason: router weight is not compact for this ordered bundle

boundaries.layout_interpretation: top-k routing weight vector [top_k_rank] in sorted top-k order
boundaries.index_order_convention: torch.topk(..., sorted=True) order; descending selected logit and therefore descending routing weight

boundaries.selected_expert_order_convention: torch.topk(..., sorted=True) order; ranks are descending selected router logit

selected_expert_computation_summary.official_source_expression: selected expert path through mlp1, SwiGLU, mlp2, optional all_reduce, and mlp2_bias, stopping before routing weighted sum

routing_weighted_sum_semantics.selected_rank_accumulation_order: torch.einsum over selected top-k rank dimension in sorted top-k order

next_bounded_step: runtime-forward compare layer1 MLP ordered bundle and report earliest mismatching seam
